title: Displays a notice about context compaction with token and message counts
purpose: Renders a visual separator with information about how the context was compacted, showing token usage before and after, and number of messages retained.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named CompactionNotice that accepts props for token counts and message retention data.

steps.content: Format the token count before compaction into a display string.
Format the token count after compaction into a display string.
Format the number of messages retained into a display string.
Render a flex container with separator bars and compacted context information.
Display the before and after token counts along with the retained message count.
